element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Immediate combat encounters with weak demons

element_introduction_order.element: Doubled demon types (new to Doom II)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional high-difficulty content for skilled players

typical_tension_triggers: Entering new area with unknown demon count
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure with nonlinear exploration allowing player-controlled relief valve through secret discovery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Nonlinear level design encourages exploration; bonuses reward wandering off beaten path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secrets contain health pickups and more powerful weapons; accessible only through exploration of level geometry

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat with weak demon variants, basic weaponry establishes player control and confidence
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased level complexity and intricacy; introduction of doubled demon types; larger groups of monsters; higher system demands reflect challenge escalation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss-class enemies used as regular encounters; peak challenge with larger intricate maps; secret levels provide extreme optional difficulty
notable_spikes: Transition from weak to varied demon types
First boss-class enemy encounter in regular level
Final approach levels with maximum density and complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels can be completed in straightforward fashion, but nonlinear design encourages wandering and offers rewards for exploration; secret discovery pattern rewards player agency
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early levels establish this as core mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels completed by finding exit via switch or teleporter; no forced inventory loss between levels (unlike original Doom episodes)
Larger and more complicated maps with larger groups of monsters; doubled non-boss monster types compared to original
Two secret levels accessible from Level 15; optional high-difficulty content for exploration-focused players
